overview: Ignite HRT specializes exclusively in hormone replacement therapy (TRT for men and HRT for women) and medication-assisted weight loss. Based in Gresham, OR, they serve the Portland metro area, Oregon, and Washington.
highlights: Exclusive focus on HRT and weight loss
In-person office visits with comprehensive lab monitoring
targetAudience: Men and women in the Portland area seeking hormone replacement therapy or medical weight loss programs.
